recommendations.title: White Fang
recommendations.overview: Jack London's classic adventure story about the friendship developed between a Yukon gold hunter and the mixed dog-wolf he rescues from the hands of a man who mistreats him.

recommendations.title: The Blue Lagoon

recommendations.title: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble

recommendations.title: Love Wrecked
recommendations.overview: 18-year-old Jenny Taylor is ecstatic when she finds out that her favorite rock star, Jason Masters, is a guest at the tropical resort where she is working for the summer. When they are both thrown overboard during a Caribbean cruise, she saves his li

recommendations.title: Grease Live
recommendations.overview: After enjoying a holiday romance, high school students Danny and Sandy are unexpectedly reunited when she transfers to Rydell High, where she must contend with cynical Rizzo and the Pink Ladies.

recommendations.title: Honey, I Blew Up the Kid

recommendations.title: Staten Island Summer
recommendations.overview: Pals Danny and Frank spend the summer after high school working as lifeguards while figuring out their future.
